where.if: AND ( u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ct.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ct.feature_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT ct.id, ct.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, ct.type, ct.amount, ct.balance_after, ct.feature_type, ct.ai_usage_log_id, ct.reason, ct.created_at FROM credit_transaction ct JOIN users u ON u.id = ct.user_id
ORDER BY ct.created_at DESC, ct.id DESC LIMIT #{criteria.size} OFFSET #{criteria.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transaction ct JOIN users u ON u.id = ct.user_id

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transaction) AS total_transactions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transaction WHERE type = 'ADMIN_ADJUST') AS admin_adjustment_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM credit_transaction WHERE amount > 0) AS total_granted, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(-amount), 0) FROM credit_transaction WHERE amount < 0) AS total_deducted, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit), 0) FROM users WHERE status != 'DELETED') AS total_user_balance
SELECT id, email, name, credit FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
